faq.q: How much water does an old toilet use?
faq.a: Pre-1994 toilets use 3.5-7 GPF. Modern low-flow toilets use 1.28 GPF or less.
A family of 4 can save 10,000+ gallons and $50-100/year by switching to low-flow.
